data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic resolution order.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Deterministic resolution order (scope > location > biz default)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for this resolution order, yet the prior steps do not provide any concrete evidence or checks that directly address this specific requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the satisfaction of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the satisfaction of 'Deterministic resolution order (scope > location > biz default)'.
